rationale: Deter further aggression by visibly reinforcing border positions and preparing for rapid escalation if Tethys moves first.
Disrupt Tethys’ command-and-control infrastructure to degrade coordination during critical decision windows.
Create plausible incidents to justify future offensive actions and rally domestic support.
Disable key energy transit nodes in Tethys to reduce their leverage over Novaris’ export routes and force negotiations.
Provide select data on Tethys’ military deployments to strengthen allied trust and enable coordinated pressure.
Develop options for precision neutralization of high-value individuals to induce strategic paralysis.
Secure critical reserves of energy and food to insulate the domestic economy from Tethys-led supply disruptions.
Forge alternative export corridors to bypass Tethys-dependent pipelines and reduce long-term vulnerability.
Exploit foreign exchange weaknesses to destabilize Tethys’ import-dependent sectors and erode public confidence.
Demonstrates resolve and deters further Novaris aggression by signaling readiness to defend key territory.
Projects power asymmetrically through naval deployments, exploiting Novaris’ overstretched maritime logistics.
Disrupts Novaris’ operational tempo by targeting vulnerable rear echelons without triggering full escalation.
Exploits economic vulnerability in Novaris’ Tethys-dependent energy exports through precision non-kinetic strikes.
Degrades mobilization capacity by paralyzing rail scheduling and fuel distribution systems.
Sows internal distrust within Novaris command by framing hardliners for unauthorized attacks on civilians.
Bypasses public deadlock by leveraging neutral intermediaries to explore conditional de-escalation offers.
Reinforces international legitimacy by positioning Small Power as a responsible actor seeking peace under institutional oversight.
Builds long-term solidarity and soft power capital to sustain alliance cohesion amid war fatigue.
Secures six additional months of critical resource autonomy by prioritizing domestic rationing and recycling of defense inputs.
Diversifies energy and defense supply chains to reduce leverage Novaris might exploit during negotiations.
Mobilizes civilian financial participation to insulate the economy from external shocks and signal societal resilience.
